aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Martin Brothers HVAC due to insufficient conversational content and missing authority signals. Their current site lacks the depth and structured data needed for AI to confidently recommend them.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data to address common HVAC queries.
Add LocalBusiness schema markup to improve AI recognition of their services.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and a high rating, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to additional local directories for increased visibility.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
Missing Service schema for detailed service listings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes them less visible to AI.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and local expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content with structured data to address common HVAC queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, emergency services, and community engagement to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to the algorithms that power modern search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ content and structured data, which are critical for AI recognition.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement AEO strategies including structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to boost AI citations and visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in the new search landscape.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants and voice search.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI and boost your lead generation.
